haiku:
Golden crusty treats,
Warm apples dance with spices,
Sweet joy on each bite.
Happy #NationalAppleTurnoverDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Books stacked high like hills,
Warm coffee brews, dreams take flight,
Rest on this sweet day.
Happy #WorkaholicsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles dance and glow,
Joyful songs and bright stories,
Magic fills the night.
#HappyBirthdayPTBarnum from @ClamBakeSanta
